title: Amtech Garden Secateurs - Heavy Duty Pruning Scissors, Easy to Use with Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handles, Sharp Steel Blades and Long Lasting, with Safety Catch and Volute Spring
features: HEAVY DUTY DIY: The pruner is perfect for home DIY, from collecting herbs and trimming flowers or plants to pruning rose bushes and branches. A staple for both professional florists and first-time gardeners that take the effort out of the work!

CLEAN CUT: Durable sharp blades made from carbon steel with a 15mm cutting capacity and a gentle cutting mechanism that won’t damage branches or plant stems, leaving an ideal environment for your plants and herbs to regrow healthier and stronger.

SUPER SAFE & EASY TO USE: The ergonomic grip is comfortable for anyone to hold, with anti-slip handles for confident cutting. A safety catch helps prevent injuries, and a volute spring prevents the blades from getting stuck for easier cutting!
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description Curved blades are made from strong carbon steel for easy cutting, and a volute spring prevents cutters from getting stuck. Easy open-and-close safety catch helps prevent accidental injuries. Comfortable to hold with anti-slip handles for confident pruning.
